nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2011; const int b = 2028; const int c = 2047; const int d = 2066; const int e = 2086; const int f = 2105; const int g = 2124; const int h = 2143; const int i = 2162; const int j = 2182; const int k = 2205; const int l = 2228; const int m = 2249; const int n = 2270; const int o = 2289; const int p = 2308; const int q = 2327; const int r = 2362;
